case_title: ENVIROPROTECT, LLC, IN THE PUBLIC INTEREST VS. AMSCAN, INC,, A NEW YORK CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-25-2022 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
